calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Default And Defalt Judgment;
Off Calendar Mar-25-2008 Denied
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT ELMER SMITH'S Motion To Set Aside Default And Defalt Judgment IS DENIED AS THERE WAS NO VALID PROOF OF SERVICE PROVIDED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. Prevailing party is to prepare a form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR# 8189 (301/PJB)
